properties.body:
[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 102/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. NE OF KOŁOBRZEG
IN THE AREA BOUNDED BY POSITIONS:1. 54-21.950N 015-24.270E
2. 54-27.080N 015-52.450E
3. 54-15.807N 016-03.294E
4. 54-11.235N 015-34.581E
LIMITED BY THE COASTLINE FROM SOUTH MISSILE FIRING WILL BE CONDUCTED ON 2026-05-12 AND 2026-05-13 FROM 0600 TO 1500 UTC.
AVOIDING THE AREA ADVISED
CANCEL THIS MSG 131500 UTC MAY
